rows.label: qev095202_MSG0001
rows.name: Did you receive our distress call?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0002
rows.name:
We were only able to broadcast a very
weak signal for fear of the Growth.
We are glad it was sufficient.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev095202_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask who the xenoforms are.

rows.label: qev095202_JNK0020
rows.name: Assist

rows.label: qev095202_SEL0021
rows.name:
Offer the xenoforms help
if they require it.

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0003
rows.name:
You came this far
without identifying us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0004
rows.name:
You humans are truly a most unusual race.
It is curious that organisms so prone to
irrational behavior have survived this long.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0005
rows.name:
Still, your arrival proves that we
were right to have sent our signal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0006
rows.name:
While you seem less than
logical, you clearly possess
considerable combat prowess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0007
rows.name:
By our calculations, humans have a 51 percent
chance of destroying the Growth. We wish to
ally ourselves with the stronger side.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0008
rows.name:
Reaching out to you for aid
was a logical inevitability.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0009
rows.name:
However, we represent a
valuable asset to the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0010
rows.name:
They will be loath to part with our
considerable technological expertise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0011
rows.name:
It follows that they will embark on
a concerted attack against your kind
in order to take us back by force.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0026
rows.name:
Indeed. Hence the distress
signal we sent out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_JNK0030
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev095202_SEL0031
rows.name: Urge them to come back to NLA with you.

rows.label: qev095202_JNK0040
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev095202_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask what their race is called.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_JNK0050
rows.name: Probe

rows.label: qev095202_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask why the xenoform
referred to itself as "we."

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0012
rows.name: That is a logical course of action.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0013
rows.name: But I fear it is somewhat premature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0014
rows.name:
There are others of my kind who
are currently stranded. I would
ask that you help me rescue them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0015
rows.name:
There is no time for protracted
introductions, but we are called the Orphe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0016
rows.name:
The reason for my haste is that there
are others of my kind awaiting aid, and
large-scale rescues require time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0017
rows.name: A rather perceptive inquiry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0018
rows.name:
As it happens, there are others
of my kind awaiting aid. I require
your help in rescuing them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0019
rows.name:
This constitutes all
existing Orphe at present.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0020
rows.name: I request that you now escort us to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0021
rows.name: Hmm... Regrettable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0022
rows.name: I suppose detection was inevitable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0023
rows.name: My kind are technologists, not warriors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0024
rows.name:
You will have to fight
them and keep us safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG0025
rows.name: Please?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG1001
rows.name: Enemy neutralization confirmed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095202_MSG1002
rows.name:
You have done well. Now please accompany
us to NLA before reinforcements arrive.[ST:wait ]
